message:
perf(cancel): migrate SymbolCancelToken and CancelBroadcaster from std RwLock to parking_lot RwLock

The cancel subsystem (SymbolCancelToken, CancelBroadcaster, CleanupCoordinator)
used std::sync::RwLock throughout, which requires .expect("lock poisoned") on
every access. parking_lot::RwLock never poisons—panics in critical sections
unwind without leaving the lock in a permanently broken state—so all 30+
.expect("lock poisoned") calls are removed, reducing code noise and eliminating
a class of cascading-panic abort scenarios.

Behavioral changes:
- try_write().is_ok() → try_write().is_some() (parking_lot API difference)
- All read()/write() calls now return the guard directly instead of Result
- No functional changes to cancellation protocol or broadcast semantics

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
